zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Lorraine於1272年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒圖爾時，她的父親Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen34歲，母親Duchess Margaret de Champagne32歲。她於1288年與Ludwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥音-炳英拉海姆 阿姆 海結婚。她去世於1335年在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特享年63歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Lorraine于1272年出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒圖爾时，她的父亲Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen34岁，母亲Duchess Margaret de Champagne32岁。她于1288年与Ludwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 麥音-炳英拉海姆 阿姆 海结婚。她去世于1335年在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特享年63岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Lorraine was born in 1272, in Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, was 34 and her mother, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, was 32. She married Ludwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern in 1288, in Ingelheim am Rhein, Mainz-Bingen, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. She died in 1335, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Lorraine est née en 1272, à Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Ludwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern en 1288, à Ingelheim am Rhein, Landkreis Mainz-Bingen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Elle est décédée en 1335, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.Ingelheim am Rhein, Mainz-Bingen, Rheinl: Ingelheim am Rhein, Landkreis Mainz-Bingen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Lorraine 1272 in Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen 34 und ihre Mutter Duchess Margaret de Champagne 32. Sie hat 1288 in Ingelheim am Rhein, Landkreis Mainz-Bingen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Ludwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern geheiratet. Sie starb 1335 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Lorraine è nata il nel 1272 nel Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Ludwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern nel 1288, nel Ingelheim am Rhein, Landkreis Mainz-Bingen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Morì nel 1335, nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Lorraineが1272年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルトウルで生まれた時，父Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringenは34歳，母Duchess Margaret de Champagneは32歳であった。1288年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス メインズ-ビンジェンインジェルヘイム アム ルヘインでLudwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayernと結婚した。彼女は1335年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントで63歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシにて埋葬された。

ko.Ingelheim am Rhein, Mainz-Bingen, Rheinl: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 맹즈-빙 잉하임 아 리인
ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Lorraine(이)가 1272년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 토우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Duchess Margaret de Champagne(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1288년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 맹즈-빙 잉하임 아 리인에서 Ludwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1335년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Lorraine nasceu em 1272, em Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Ludwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern em 1288, em Ingelheim am Rhein, Landkreis Mainz-Bingen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Ela faleceu em 1335, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Lorraine родилась в 1272 г. в местности тоул, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Duchess Margaret de Champagne, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ludwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern в 1288 г. в местности ингелхим ам раин, ландкрис меинз-бинген, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. Она умерла в 1335 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Lorraine nació en 1272, en Toul, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Ludwig III von Wittelsbach Herzog von Bayern en 1288, en Ingelheim am Rhein, Landkreis Mainz-Bingen, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Murió en 1335, en Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
